description: MCP server for Yandex Wordstat API: top & related queries, demand dynamics and regions.
name: io.github.askads/mcp-yandex-wordstat

environmentVariables.description: Which Wordstat API to use: "cloud" (Yandex Cloud Search API v2, default) or "oauth" (api.wordstat.yandex.net).
environmentVariables.name: WORDSTAT_FLAVOR

environmentVariables.description: Yandex Cloud API key (Search API). Required when WORDSTAT_FLAVOR=cloud. Treat it as a secret.
environmentVariables.name: WORDSTAT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Yandex Cloud folder id, injected into every request. Required when WORDSTAT_FLAVOR=cloud.
environmentVariables.name: WORDSTAT_FOLDER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Yandex OAuth token for api.wordstat.yandex.net. Required when WORDSTAT_FLAVOR=oauth. Treat it as a secret.
environmentVariables.name: WORDSTAT_TOKEN

title: Yandex Wordstat MCP
